title: 4.3 million km2 humid areas turned to drylands since 30 years ago
subtitle: Areas that were humid during the 1960-1990 period that are now classified as drylands.
visdescription: A world map showing the areas that converted to drylands in the 1990 - 2020 period compared to the 1960-1990 period
